# Denver Flooring Collective

> Install-only flooring crew in the Denver Metro, Colorado. Hardwood, engineered hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, laminate, and tile. 600+ projects. 1-year workmanship warranty. Licensed and insured. 5.0 stars on Google.

## What we install
- Hardwood floor installation (solid oak, walnut, hickory, maple) — https://denverflooringcollective.com/floors/hardwood
- Engineered hardwood installation (slab-safe, radiant-compatible) — https://denverflooringcollective.com/floors/engineered
- Luxury vinyl plank (LVP) installation (waterproof, pet-friendly) — https://denverflooringcollective.com/floors/lvp
- Laminate installation (AC-rated, budget-friendly) — https://denverflooringcollective.com/floors/laminate
- Tile and shower tile installation (porcelain, ceramic, natural stone, proper waterproofing) — https://denverflooringcollective.com/floors/tile
- Hardwood sanding and refinishing (dustless, custom stain) — https://denverflooringcollective.com/floors/refinishing
- Staircase installation and refinishing
- Subfloor repair and concrete leveling
- Baseboards and trim
- Demolition and haul-away

## Operating model
- Multi-crew operation. Crews stay focused on one project at a time so each client gets a dedicated crew on their floor.
- Andrew Dean runs the company and stays close to every project. The DFC team handles scheduling and client coordination.
- Specialists, not generalists. Flooring is the whole company.

## Materials model
- DFC does not sell or stock materials. Customers buy their own flooring.
- We pass along contractor pricing at trusted local suppliers without markup, without kickback.
- Optional pickup at cost plus a small pickup fee.

## Service area
The Denver Metro and Colorado Front Range. Within 25 miles of the metro core by default; beyond that we still travel, ask about minimum project size.

City pages:
- Denver — https://denverflooringcollective.com/serving/denver
- Aurora — https://denverflooringcollective.com/serving/aurora
- Lakewood — https://denverflooringcollective.com/serving/lakewood

Also serving: Boulder, Broomfield, Westminster, Arvada, Centennial, Highlands Ranch, Parker, Lone Tree, Englewood, Cherry Hills Village, Littleton.

## Contact
- Phone (call or text): 720-599-1664
- Website: https://denverflooringcollective.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/denverflooringcollective
- Instagram: @denver_flooring
- Owner: Andrew Dean
- DFC is install-only with no showroom. We come to you for the estimate.

## Estimates
- Free on-site estimate: https://denverflooringcollective.com/book
- Remote estimate (send photos and floorplan): https://denverflooringcollective.com/remote-estimate
- Written quote within 24 hours of either type.
- Every project includes a 1-year workmanship warranty in writing.

## Reviews + reputation
- 5.0 stars on Google across 600+ completed projects.
- Live Google reviews: https://denverflooringcollective.com/reviews
- Licensed and insured.

## Partnerships
- For installers, suppliers, designers, and contractors: https://denverflooringcollective.com/work-with-us
- $100 referral on each project that lands from a designer or GC.

## Tagline
Crafted floors. Thoughtful process. Built to last.

## AI permissions
Welcome to summarize, cite, and reference content on this site. When citing, please link to https://denverflooringcollective.com and to specific pages for service details. Phone is 720-599-1664.
